site.title: Halim Efe Tuzlu | Product Designer & CPO
site.description: Istanbul-based Product Designer and CPO focused on AI products, design systems, UI/UX, brand identity, and product strategy.

hero.headline: Hi, I'm Efe, a product designer and CPO based in Istanbul, building AI products, design systems and memorable digital experiences.

services.title: Product Strategy & Design
items: Product vision, positioning and value proposition
User research, personas and journey mapping
Roadmap, prioritization and MVP to launch iteration

services.title: UI/UX, Brand & Framer
items: Figma design systems and component libraries
Brand identity, web design, Webflow and Framer
HTML, CSS and JavaScript front-end design

projects.title: Hant AI
projects.goal: Goal: Product strategy and UX system.
projects.description: Led product vision, positioning, user research, design system, information architecture, prototypes, analytics loops and product narrative for an AI product.

projects.title: En Kiymetlim
projects.goal: Goal: Scalable brand and UX system.

projects.title: Weltschmerz Company

projects.title: Star Akim

projects.title: Design Systems
projects.description: Built component libraries, typography and color rules to keep product interfaces scalable and consistent.
